zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hopton於大約1405年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Hopton36歲，母親Margaret de Pert19歲。他於大約1427年2月26日與Margaret Savile結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布萊斯賀包霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Hopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hopton, such as those in Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Suffolk, from Old English hop ‘remote enclosed place’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hopton was born about 1405, in England, his father, Thomas Hopton, was 36 and his mother, Margaret de Pert, was 19. He married Margaret Savile about 26 February 1427. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1478, at the age of 74, and was buried in Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hopton est né environ 1405, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hopton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Pert, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Savile environ 26 février 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1478, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hopton um 1405 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hopton 36 und seine Mutter Margaret de Pert 19. Er hat um 26. Februar 1427 Margaret Savile geheiratet. it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hopton è nato il circa 1405 nel England, il suo padre, Thomas Hopton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Pert, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Savile circa 26 febbraio 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1478, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hoptonが約1405年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Hoptonは36歳，母Margaret de Pertは19歳であった。約1427年2月26日にMargaret Savileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年に74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリスブルグホーリー トリニトイ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: John Hopton(이)가 대략 1405년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hopton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Pert(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1427년 2월 26일 Margaret Savile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hopton nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hopton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Pert, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Savile aproximadamente 26 de fevereiro de 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1478, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suf: холи тринити чурчярд, блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hopton родился около 1405 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Hopton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Pert, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Savile около 26 февраля 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1478 г. в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности холи тринити чурчярд, блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1478, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
